acceptance_results.criterion: Landing web must build after resolving conflicting App Router dynamic segment names.

completed_work: Renamed landing-web dynamic route folders from slug/slug conflicts to tenant/slug.
Preserved legacy single-segment campaign behavior by treating /lp/[tenant] as the campaign slug path.
Updated campaign API route params and metadata handling for the new segment names.
known_gaps: npm audit still fails on Next/PostCSS advisories; dependency upgrade was not made because it is approval-gated.
operator_message: Landing-web dynamic route conflict is fixed and npm run build passes.
risk_notes: Analytics and transaction slug semantics should be watched in runtime QA, but the route build failure is resolved.
summary: Landing-web App Router dynamic route conflict repaired.

validation.output_excerpt: build passed on clean origin/main branch with /api/campaigns/[tenant], /api/campaigns/[tenant]/[slug], /lp/[tenant], /lp/[tenant]/[slug]
